We aim to build a solid community of like mind Crypto enthusiasts by creating a ground swell of support for individual crypto coins.
Our objective is to send 4 signals per week. When you receive these signals the aim is to purchase the selected coin at a given time. Once you purchase the coin you then promote the coin on all your social media channels, facebook twitter, instagram 
Promoting the selected coin is one of the most important factor for a successful pump is creating ‘hype’ around the coin. Creating hype is a group effort. The more subscribers we have the more impact we can make to drive interest in the coin. 
Even though we are all small investors we can all make a difference if we all post on social media.  
The exchange which we will use is Binance international. For US residents we will post how you can register with Binance international shortly.
Discord Server coming soon
🐳🐳 We predict from our research that each coin signal will produce a return of between 50% to 100% 🐳🐳

💥TELL YOUR FRIENDS, SPREAD THE WORD💥
Help us spread the word, tell your friends about us. The faster we get to critical mass of subscribers we can start helping out the little crypto guys out there while you make great returns on your investments.

💥WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT💥
We have been involved with crypto since 2011 and have seen crypto projects come and go, some good, some bad and some downright ugly. Of the good ones the main reason they fail is due to lack of funding. We have therefore decided to find great crypto projects and help boost their exposure in the crypto world. Help us make a difference, CRYPTO IS THE FUTURE but the future can only be created and maintained with your help. Lets go!!

With CCPS the same coin could be signaled twice in the same week or month. Doing this reduces the risk of being left holding bags If you bought too many and too high. No other Crypto Signals channel on Telegram offers this get out of jail card. ❤️❤️❤️

💥 HOW TO SPOT THE SCAMMERS💥
Telegram is full of scammers trying to part you from your hard-earnt crypto. Here are some common things that scammers will do or say to get your FOMO alarms ringing:

1. Scammers promising to give you access to coin signals in advance of the official signal. There are some “fake” copy cat telegram groups which claim they have a VIP channel for a one-time payment of $99 for advance notification of which coin will be pumped. This is a scam.


2. Scammers contacting you directly via a discord channel or via youtube comments promising to look after your investments. They will promise eye-watering returns to get your FOMO going, again, once you had over the crypto to scammers it's gone for good. We will never contact you directly offering financial crypto services. 


3. Lookout for coin pump signal channels with no active community but just repetitive messages telling you about up and coming pumps. (Our discord server is almost ready and we are looking forward to chatting with you champions) 


4. Do not fall for pump signals that promise returns of 1000’s of percentages on single trades, this again is to get your FOMO bells going.


5. Avoid Youtube videos and adverts asking you to send crypto to an address promising to return 10x the deposit amount. These are once again scams and Youtube is doing very little to combat these types of videos.


Please take the time to sub to our Twitter channel which you find in the previous post. We will post more news there since we want to minimise the number of messages to no more than two per day. 

As always a warm welcome to our newest members, please take the time to share this group with all your crypto friends, the sooner we get to critical mass we can launch our first signals

Have a great day, to the MOOOOOOOOON!!!!
